title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model for local agentic workflows on laptops with 16GB VRAM. It features unified encoder-free architecture for text, vision, and audio, plus multi-token prediction drafters to reduce inference latency. The model integrates with tools like LiteRT-LM, Ollama, Hermes, and AI Edge Gallery for offline deployment.
